历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 14925→14601→15629→15023→18382, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. Especially in 2025, it dropped about 3359 places compared to 2024, a significant decrease; over the past 3 years, it has cumulatively dropped about 3753 places, indicating a continuous decline in the popularity of this university among Shaanxi science students. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 43 students in both 2021 and 2022, increased to 45 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 48 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 61 students, an increase of 13 students (about 27%) compared to 2025, which theoretically lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Dalian Maritime University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is approximately 113th, fluctuating between 99 and 113 in recent years, placing it at the mid-to-lower level among 211 universities. There is no obvious negative public opinion in the reputation file. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 50th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure and general attention. There are no historical abnormal admission records for this university, indicating stable application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines. Its advantageous disciplines are mainly in maritime fields such as Transportation Engineering (B+), which have some connection with the enrollment majors like Transportation, Mechanical, and Automation, but overall disciplinary appeal is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The university's science enrollment majors mainly include Computer, Electronic Information, Automation, and Electrical categories. These major categories have been consistently popular/highly recommended in 2024–2025, strongly attracting candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly expanding the competition base. The university is located in Dalian, Liaoning, not a local institution, with no significant regional preference advantage.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the inertia of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the favorable 27% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 19.7% increase in local physics candidates, the expansion rate slightly exceeds the candidate growth rate, overall competition slightly eases, and the ranking is expected to continue dropping (number increasing) from the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is about 21,419, with a range of 20,919–21,919.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors.
